subcodes.first_line: Hearken, O Mahdi, unto the call of Him Who is drowning in a sea of tribulation.
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی استمع ندآء من کان متغمسا فی بحر البلاء و اذا تمهله الامواج یرفع راسه
subcodes.subjects: @episodes from the early history of Islam, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection of Muhammad, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
